|The story line|

It is Edo Era Japan where corruption runs rampant and it is essentially every man for himself. Beneath its veil of stability and peace, a dark reality lurks waiting to ensnare the unsuspecting. Power and connections are essential, and even friends can’t be trusted.

This is your journey and story through the Edo Era.

How do you proceed?
